use_cases: Displaying property or venue locations on business websites with interactive 3D tilt effects
Showing store or restaurant locations in e-commerce checkout flows
Presenting event venue information with expandable details
Creating interactive location pickers for travel or delivery applications
Enhancing contact pages with animated location cards
ai_summary: A 3D interactive location map component featuring mouse-tracking tilt effects and click-to-expand functionality. Displays location name and coordinates with smooth spring animations using Framer Motion. The card rotates in 3D space following cursor movement, creating an engaging parallax-like effect that reveals additional information on click.
